name: Bikash Maharjan
content: Lexis & Legis guided us through our Series A funding round with exceptional attention to detail. Their corporate team understood both Nepalese law and international investor requirements.

name: Sarah Mitchell
content: We resolved a complex contract dispute favorably thanks to their litigation team's strategic approach. Professional, transparent, and results-driven throughout.

name: Dr. Anjali Gurung
content: Their IP team secured our trademark and patent protections efficiently. Highly recommend for any business protecting intellectual property in Nepal.
